title: Identical Signs
description: Make Signs Consistent With Each Other!
body:
# Welcome To Identical Signs!
This is a Resource Pack meant to bridge the texture gap between **Signs** and **Hanging Signs**. Their textures are really inconsistent with each other, so I made this pack to give parity to them.

## This Pack Alters:
- All _Sign_ Textures
- All _Hanging Sign_ Textures
- All *Item Textures* of the Above Blocks
